name: Yari Shogi
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Yari Shogi (Spear Shogi, Christian Freeling 1981): a 7x9 Shogi variant whose pieces are forward-ranging 'spears' (slide any distance straight forward like a lance, each with a small extra step). Captured spears switch sides and drop back into play; pieces promote in the far three ranks to forms that also range straight backward.
